home.heroBody: We create considered residential interiors — spaces that feel personal, enduring, and alive.
home.aboutHeading: A studio for spaces that feel like home
home.aboutBody: Studio Bosko is the practice of Kasia Kronberger, an interior designer working across Berlin, Warsaw, and Europe. We work on full-scope residential projects — from concept to completion.
home.offeringBody: Full-scope residential interior design, from initial concept through to construction supervision and styling.
home.pressIntro: Studio Bosko has been named AD100 for 2025.
home.inquireBody: We take on a small number of projects each year to ensure every client receives our full attention.
home.introBody: Personality-driven interiors layered with character, culture, and craftsmanship. Blending spatial planning with emotive curation, we craft homes that feel artful, personal, and true to how you actually live.
home.introH1: Interior design studio based in Berlin and working across Europe.
home.offeringBodyFull: Studio Bosko is a Berlin-based interior design studio running full-scope residential projects across Europe — from historic renovations and high-end new builds in Berlin and Warsaw, to complete interior design and furnishing schemes in Germany, Austria and beyond. Founded by Kasia Kronberger, the studio focuses on custom residential and boutique commercial projects.
home.testimonialQuote: "With Studio Bosko taking care of everything, we could lean back and enjoy our beautiful place. While initially unsure if interior design would be worth it, we now have no doubt that it added value to our place and enhanced our wellbeing."
home.ctaBodyFull: We take on a limited number of projects each year. If you're considering a renovation or new home, we'd love to hear about it.

studio.metaTitle: About Studio Bosko — Interior Designer Kasia Kronberger, Berlin
studio.metaDescription: AD100-recognised interior design studio led by Kasia Kronberger. Based in Berlin, working internationally. Personality-driven homes crafted with curatorial instinct.
studio.intro: Studio Bosko is the practice of Kasia Kronberger, an interior designer based in Berlin.
studio.body1: We work on full-scope residential projects across Berlin, Warsaw, and Europe — from initial concept through to construction supervision and final styling.
studio.body2: Our approach is rooted in careful listening. Every project begins with a deep understanding of how our clients live, what they love, and what they aspire to. From there, we build spaces that are personal, considered, and built to last.
studio.body3: Kasia studied interior design in Warsaw and has worked in studios in Paris and Berlin before founding Studio Bosko in 2018.
studio.award2: Featured in Vogue, AD Germany, Domino, est living
studio.headline: We design personality-driven spaces—crafted with curatorial instinct and delivered with clarity.
studio.aboutBody1: As an interior design studio named AD100 for 2025 by Architectural Digest Polska, we are tastemakers for clients who share a strong appreciation for art, culture, and craftsmanship. We create layered, personality-driven homes with a clear point of view—confident, curated, and boldly individual. Our work balances high design with lived-in ease—spaces that feel as effortless as they are intentional. A quest for artful character runs through everything we curate, shaping homes that don't just look beautiful, but feel deeply personal.
studio.aboutBody2: Practicality and liveability are equally important to us, so each of our designs is entirely custom. We design to support how you actually live, when no one is watching. Because great design isn't just seen — it's felt.
studio.aboutBody3: Led by Kasia Kronberger, Studio Bosko brings together structured precision and intuitive curation. Kasia's background spans education in business and trend forecasting, and international design experience across London, Florence, Barcelona, and Brussels. Her work is shaped by a global sensibility—layering modern craftsmanship, historical references, and joyful tension into interiors that are worldly and authentically evocative. She is recognised for creating spaces that start conversations: rooms rich with personality, intentional clashes, and emotional resonance—without ever feeling staged or overworked.
studio.ethosBody: Design for us is never about surface or spectacle but rather about self-expression and growth. Home is often our most valuable asset. Whereas the best interiors are the ones filled with character.
studio.ctaOffering: Check out what we can do for you

offering.metaTitle: Interior Design Services — Full-Scope Residential Projects | Studio Bosko
offering.metaDescription: Full-scope interior design services: space planning, bespoke specifications, procurement, art sourcing and project supervision. Berlin, Warsaw, Vienna and across Europe.
offering.service1Body: We begin every project with a thorough briefing process — understanding how you live, what you love, and what you want your home to feel like. From this we develop a clear design concept: a spatial vision, material palette, and mood that guides all decisions.
offering.service2Body: We develop detailed floor plans, furniture layouts, lighting design, material specifications, and bespoke joinery drawings. Every element is considered in relation to the whole.
offering.service3Body: We source furniture, textiles, art, and objects from our network of European suppliers and makers — alongside vintage and one-of-a-kind pieces that give each project its character.
offering.service4Body: We work with trusted contractors and craftspeople, overseeing all work to ensure the vision is realised precisely. We manage the process so you don't have to.
offering.service5Body: We style and dress the completed space — placing every object, artwork, and plant — and hand over a home that is ready to live in from day one.
offering.processBody: Every project is unique, but our process is consistent: thorough at the start, precise in the middle, personal at the end.
offering.ctaBody: We take on a small number of projects each year.
offering.headline: We're a full-service interior design practice based in Berlin and Warsaw, running projects internationally.
offering.mainBody1: We specialize in full-scope residential projects, overseeing every phase of the process with care and clarity. We understand you need an expert partner to design your home—one that grasps your personal style and translates it into a unique, timeless interior, without the operational hassle. With our intuition for the emotive connections and business expertise, we articulate visions and bring them to fruition for our discerning clientele.
scopeItems: Interior Design, Finish and Fixture Specifications
offering.tagline: If we're in, we're all in.
